title: VsBase
description: A base for building modpacks with Valkyrien Skies 2.
body:
This modpack is intended to be used as a base for your own modpack or tinkering around. You can find a modpack for each version that Valkyrien Skies 2 supports. That's 1.16.5/1.18.2/1.19.2/1.20.1 fabric and forge.

In general, forge will have more addons while fabric will have better performance. Some addons are only available on some versions.

If you need help with your modpack you can join the [Valkyrien Skies Discord](https://discord.gg/tkjfGr7).

## Important!
(Updated May 17th, 2024)
- The 1.20.1 fabric modpack uses a patched version of Create: Interactive.

  **DO NOT REPORT BUGS WITH IT TO THE DEVELOPERS!**

- If you're experiencing lighting issues on blocks like chests or tracks it's likely the flywheel backend of create. You can change it to batching mode to fix the issue but be warned. Instancing is default so you may experience crashes. Off should also work but may reduce performance.

- Development of Valkyrien Skies 2 has moved from 1.16.5 to 1.18.2 and as such it is very unlikely that you'll get support for issues on 1.16.5.

- The 1.20.1 version of Valkyrien Skies 2 currently has a major issue with wings/flaps. If you plan on building planes, helicopters, or other such vehicles that'd use wings/flaps don't use 1.20.1


<details>
<summary>Addon Explainations</summary>
  
- Create: Eureka!
  
  A create SU powered engine for Eureka
- Valkyrien Engines
  
  A Solar and electric engine for Eureka
- Not Found
  
  Blocks which can move your Eureka ship in all axes
- KubeVS
  
  Support for controlling VS2 ships with KubeJS
- Valkyrien Pirates
  
  Moving pirate ships using VS2 physics and Eureka
- Valkyrien Relogs
  
  A block to make you login where you left on Eureka ships
- Better VS Ship Assembler
  
  A better ship assembler tool than the one that comes with VS2
- BulletFix
  
  Compatibility between CGM and VS2
- CC: VS
  
  Support for controlling VS2 ships with CC via APIs
- Clockwork
  
  Additions to allow create SU to power ships
- Create: Interactive
  
  Support for turning Create contraptions into VS2 ships
- Kontraption
  
  Additions to allow mekanism to power ships
- Some Peripherals
  
  Additions to allow CC to detect changes around your ship
- Trackwork
  
  Treads which you can use to create land vehicles 
- VMod
  
  A tool for constraining and playing with VS2 physics
- VS Addition
  
  Compatibility fixes and additions to VS2
- VS Mini Worlds
  
  Blocks which create small interactable platforms above them
- VS: Tournament
  
  Random fun additions
- Valkyrien Storage - Sophisticated Compatibility
  
  Fixes duping with Sophisticated Storage
- Eureka! Ships! for Valkyrien Skies (Forge/Fabric)
  
  Blocks which can be used to create air and sea vehicles
- Valkyrien Computers
  
  Support for controlling VS2 ships with CC via peripherals


</details>

<details>
<summary>List of available addons for each version</summary>

## 1.20.1
### Fabric
- CC: VS
- Clockwork
- Create: Eureka!
- Create: Interactive (patched version, don't report bugs to devs!)
- Eureka! Ships! for Valkyrien Skies (Forge/Fabric)
- VMod
- VS: Tournament
- Valkyrien Engines
- Valkyrien Pirates
- Valkyrien Relogs
### Forge
- CC: VS
- Clockwork
- Create: Eureka!
- Create: Interactive
- Eureka! Ships! for Valkyrien Skies (Forge/Fabric)
- Kontraption
- VMod
- VS Addition
- VS: Tournament
- Valkyrien Relogs
## 1.19.2
### Fabric

- Clockwork
- Eureka! Ships! for Valkyrien Skies (Forge/Fabric)

### Forge

- Clockwork
- Create: Interactive
- Eureka! Ships! for Valkyrien Skies (Forge/Fabric)
- Valkyrien Storage - Sophisticated Compatibility
## 1.18.2
### Fabric
- Better VS Ship Assembler
- CC: VS
- Clockwork
- Eureka! Ships! for Valkyrien Skies (Forge/Fabric)
- KubeVS
- Some Peripherals
- VMod
- VS Addition
- VS Mini Worlds
- VS: Tournament
- Valkyrien Computers
- Valkyrien Pirates
- Valkyrien Relogs
### Forge
- Better VS Ship Assembler
- BulletFix
- CC: VS
- Clockwork
- Create: Interactive
- Eureka! Ships! for Valkyrien Skies (Forge/Fabric)
- Kontraption
- Some Peripherals
- Trackwork
- VMod
- VS Addition
- VS Mini Worlds
- VS: Tournament
- Valkyrien Computers
- Valkyrien Storage - Sophisticated Compatibility
## 1.16.5
### Fabric
- Eureka! Ships! for Valkyrien Skies (Forge/Fabric)
- Valkyrien Computers
### Forge
- Eureka! Ships! for Valkyrien Skies (Forge/Fabric)

</details>
